hooks.command: python3 -c "import json,sys,subprocess,os; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); not f.endswith('.py') and sys.exit(0); r='.venv/bin/ruff' if os.path.exists('.venv/bin/ruff') else 'ruff'; subprocess.run([r,'format',f],capture_output=True); res=subprocess.run([r,'check','--fix',f],capture_output=True,text=True); res.returncode!=0 and print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput':{'hookEventName':'PostToolUse','additionalContext':'Ruff errors in '+f+':\n'+res.stdout.strip()}}))"
